notes: Japan's data protection authority — administers the Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI).

match_nodes.description: Act on the Protection of Personal Information

data.official_name: Act on the Protection of Personal Information
data.description: Japan's primary data protection statute, originally enacted 2003, most recently amended 2020/2022. 8 chapters, Articles 1-88.

children.description: APPI article reference (e.g. art-20, art-16-2). Hyphenated numbers (e.g. art-58-2) are supplementary articles inserted between existing ones by later amendments.

data.notes: No stable per-article anchor URL is published; the URL resolves to the full Act. Structured per-article text is available in the CloudSecurityAlliance-DataSets repo (dataset-public-laws-regulations-standards, regulation/ppc.go.jp/appi/appi-articles.json) for 81 of 88 articles — 17 numbers (7, 18, 23, 27, 28, 30, 36, 42, 44, 53, 58, 59, 63, 68, 71, 76, 87) are not yet recovered from the source PDF extraction; see that repo's TODO.md.

examples.note: Prohibition of Inappropriate Utilization (supplementary article inserted by amendment)
Security Control Action — the core security-obligations article for a personal information handling business operator
